---
name: Bug report
about: Report a defect in TAROKE RIMIXER
labels: bug
---

## Observed behavior

What actually happened. Be specific about which step/layer/control was involved.

## Expected behavior

What should have happened instead.

## Browser and viewport

- Browser: (e.g. Chromium 130, Firefox 120, Safari 17)
- Viewport: (e.g. 390px mobile, 1280px desktop)

## Environment

- [ ] Local (`file://` or localhost)
- [ ] Live (GitHub Pages)

## Steps to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Screenshot or console log

Paste a screenshot or any browser console errors here.

## Regression test expectation

Describe the assertion a regression test should check so this defect cannot
recur silently. (e.g. "Test that clicking slot chip X does not leave `,,` in
route template output.")

## Severity

- [ ] Blocking — core workflow broken
- [ ] Major — feature unusable but workaround exists
- [ ] Minor — cosmetic or edge-case only
